memoryArtifacts.headline: Strutt of Glemsford, Suffolk by Harold F. Porter, Jr. 1983 Belgrave & Frost Families
Strutt, Frost and Belgrave Families – Wills with Biographical Data

Thomas Strutt
(1500 – before 10 December 1548)
memoryArtifacts.description:
Thomas Strutt was born about 1500, probably in Glemsford, Suffolk, England. 

He was the son of John and Elizabeth Strutt of Glemsford, Suffolk, England. 

His father was a blacksmith and left Thomas …

zh.lifeSummary: Thomas Strutt是John Strutt和Isabelle的兒子，出生。他和Johane至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於從1544年到1548年在英國素福爾可格萊姆斯福德，埋葬在英國素福爾可朗 梅爾福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Thomas Strutt是John Strutt和Isabelle的儿子，出生。他和Johane至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于从1544年到1548年在英国素福爾可格萊姆斯福德，埋葬在英国素福爾可朗 梅爾福德。

nameMeanings.name: Strutt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: topographic name from Middle High German struot, strūt ‘brush, thicket, swamp’, or a habitational name from any of several places called Struth with this word.

variants.name: Strout
meanings: English: nickname for an argumentative person, from Middle English strout, strut ‘strife, dispute, debate’ (Old English strūt).
English: from the Old Norse personal name Strútr, Strut, apparently a nickname from strútr ‘pointed hood’ (referring to a cone-like ornament on a headdress or cap).
Possibly also an Americanized form of Dutch Stroet: habitational name from Stroet in North Holland or a topographic name from Dutch stroet ‘brush, thicket, swamp’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Thomas Strutt was born as the son of John Strutt and Isabelle. He had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Johane. He died from 1544 to 1548, in Glemsford, Suffolk, England, and was buried in Long Melford, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Thomas Strutt est né, fils de John Strutt et Isabelle. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Johane. Il est décédé du 1544 au 1548, à Glemsford, Suffolk, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Long Melford, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Thomas Strutt wurde, als Sohn von John Strutt und Isabelle geboren. Er hatte mit Johane mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb von 1544 bis 1548 in Glemsford, Suffolk, England und wurde in Long Melford, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Thomas Strutt è nato il come figlio di John Strutt e Isabelle. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Johane. Morì da 1544 a 1548, nel Glemsford, Suffolk, England, e fu sepolto a Long Melford, Suffolk, England.

ja.Long Melford, Suffolk, England: イギリススフォルクロング メルフォード
ja.Glemsford, Suffolk, England: イギリススフォルクグレムスフォード
ja.Glemsford, Suffolk, England, United King: イギリススフォルクグレムスフォード
ja.lifeSummary: Thomas StruttはJohn StruttとIsabelleの息子として生まれた。彼はJohaneとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼はから1544年まで1548年にイギリススフォルクグレムスフォードで死去し，イギリススフォルクロング メルフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Strutt(은)는 John Strutt(와)과 Isabelle의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Johane(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1544년 부터 1548년 까지 영국 수폴크 글레스퍼드에서 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 론그 멜퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Thomas Strutt nasceu filho de John Strutt e Isabelle. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Johane. Ele faleceu de 1544 a 1548, em Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Long Melford, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Thomas Strutt родился. Его родителей звали John Strutt и Isabelle. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Johane. Он умер с 1544 по 1548 в местности глемсфорд, суффолк, Англия и был похоронен в местности лонг мелфорд, суффолк, Англия.

sm.from 1544 to 1548: mai le 1544 e o'o I le 1548

es.lifeSummary: Thomas Strutt nació como hijo de John Strutt y Isabelle. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Johane. Murió desde 1544 hasta 1548, en Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, y fue sepultado en Long Melford, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
